caption: A man with a large, white, upright wig, glasses, and a white button-down shirt with a red and white bow tie sits in a recording studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and looks slightly to the left. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and shelves containing folded clothing. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left side of the scene, while the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears again on the right. The man remains largely stationary across the sequence, maintaining a serious expression as he looks off-camera. There is very little movement between the frames, suggesting a static shot of the man during a podcast recording session.
